name: Hexfit API
description:
Hexfit is a comprehensive fitness and health management platform for professionals and clients. 
The Hexfit API provides programmatic access to a wide range of features and data within the Hexfit ecosystem, enabling seamless integration with third-party applications and custom workflows.

The structure of the API endpoint is https://[version].[environment].hexfit.io/[resource].

Version are representing the old API and the new one. We are slowly passing from v2 -> v3. Therefore, some endpoint are still in v2 and some are in v3. The v3 is the future of our API and the one we are actively developing. 

## Versions
### V2 Specifications
Responses use the envelope `{"success": true, "value": ..., "version": 3}`.

### V3 specifications 
Responses use the envelope `{"success": true, "data": ..., "version": 3}`.

In case of an error, the response use the envelope : `{"success": false, "message": "", "code": 500, "version": 3}`.

## Environments

We have two environments (you need to use the one base on your account) : 
- ca : Canada
- eu : Europe

## Authentication

Authentication is using Bearer token.
